meaning: n.(意大利)伦巴第族的人,银行家,放款者
examples: Jimmy Securities analyst Shelly Lombard stated in a survey, "Ford's development is exactly what we expect to see."
Is San Francisco, Lombard Street, the twistiest street in the world?
Lombard Street Research sees an "iron bubble".
Right in the City of London, in a beautiful Grade II-listed building, is 1 Lombard Street.
Look out below, says Diana Choyleva, director of Lombard Street Research in Hong Kong.
